title: My battle mod
description: This mod lets you turn mobs from different mods into rival teams, manage their alliances, move them around, and track their health – all with simple wands and commands.
body:
# My Battle Mod

**Three wands, endless battles.**

My Battle Mod adds three simple yet powerful items to Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).  
No dependencies – works with **any** Forge mod's mobs.

---

## Features

### Battle Wand – Make mobs from different mods fight each other

- Right-click any mob to create a team for its mod (team name = mod ID).
- Right-click the same leader mob again to disband that mod's team.
- Sneak + right-click to disband all teams.
- Right-click air to change modes.
- When a team is created, all existing mobs of that mod are automatically added to the team.
- Newly spawned mobs automatically join their mod's team.
- Mobs from different teams become hostile to each other (no range limit).
- Leader mobs receive a glowing effect while their team is active.

### Boss Wand – Add a real-time health bar to any mob

- Right-click a mob to display a BossBar above the screen, showing its health.
- The bar updates automatically as the mob takes damage or heals.
- Right-click the same mob again to remove the BossBar.
- Right-click air to change the bossbar's color.
- Works on any living entity (including modded bosses).
- The BossBar is visible to all nearby players.

### Move Wand – Move the mob

- Right-click mobs to select/deselect them (multiple selection allowed).
- Right-click the ground to move all selected mobs to that location.
- Right-click air to toggle between Teleport and Walk mode.
- Sneak + right-click air to clear all selections.

### Multi-language support

All in-game messages are fully translatable via language files (English and Chinese included).

---

## How to get the items

In Creative mode, find them under the **Tools & Utilities** tab.

Example commands:
- /give @p mybattlemod:battle_wand
- /give @p mybattlemod:boss_wand
- /give @p mybattlemod:move_wand

---

## Commands (`/mybattlemod`)

- `/mybattlemod team` – Manage teams (add, remove, list, members, join, leave, friendly fire)
- `/mybattlemod move` – Move mobs (teleport, walk, manage selection)
- `/mybattlemod ally` – Manage alliances (add, remove, list, delete alliance)
- `/mybattlemod information` – Control mob head display (mod ID, alliance icon, both, clear all)
- `/mybattlemod targetmode` – Switch target selector mode (replace vanilla or merge)
- `/mybattlemod sightrange` – Set or get mob detection range

---

## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.x
- Works with **any** Forge mod – no extra libraries needed.
